title: Emailing a Contact When a Deal is Won
excerpt: When a deal is won and has a contact name with an email address connected to this, I would like to send an email to them twice.  Once after 7 days and then another after 3 days.  I can see how to send an email to a board…

posts.author: PurnimaGore (Purnima Gore)
posts.cookedHtml:
When a deal is won and has a contact name with an email address connected to this, I would like to send an email to them twice. Once after 7 days and then another after 3 days. I can see how to send an email to a board owner and team member but not to the email address of the contact. I can see how I can send an email to the contact without automation but not with the use case I have given above.

Hopefully someone has done this already. I can see how to do this in Pipedrive but not on Monday CRM

Thanks
PG

posts.author: danmedalle (Dan Jezreel Medalle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Purnima,

You can use the automation recipe that looks like the one attached.

Screenshot 2024-10-14 at 4.34.41 PM598×514 20.8 KB

Configure it to send an email to the “Email” column (Contact’s Email) 7 days after the “Won Date” arrives. Create the same automation for 3 days after Won Date as well.

When setting up the automation, you’ll be prompt to connect it to the account where the emails are sent from. Let me know how it goes or if you encounter any issues!

Best,
Dan | Monday.com Expert - MIndflows

posts.author: PurnimaGore (Purnima Gore)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @danmedalle

I had a look and it is fine on work management, but I want the automation on the Sales CRM.

This means manually writing the email into the column.

What we need, is for the customer contact on the deal specifically to be emailed and there doesn’t appear to be an option to choose deal, look at a stage and then email the customer.

Thanks for the suggestion though.

Purnima

posts.author: Yash.Gangani (Yash Gangani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @PurnimaGore

With EasyMails , you can design email templates specifically for deals using our drag-and-drop editor, which allows you to easily customize emails with placeholders for customer details. This setup makes it simple to create a tailored template that can be used across different deals.

Once your template is ready, you can send emails directly through your monday.com board, making it a seamless process without the need to manually enter each email. I believe this is one of the easiest and most efficient ways to address the challenge you’re facing.

Happy to help if you need any guidance on setting it up!

Screenshot 2024-10-24 at 1.15.11 PM1570×548 77.2 KB
